metadata.description: Shared agent skills for CodeVine teams

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Query and manage Jira issues - search, create, bulk create, update, comment, link, transition status, and look up users.

plugins.name: skill-builder
plugins.description: Build API skills for Claude Code using TypeScript interfaces instead of MCP servers. Use this when creating new skills that wrap REST APIs.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Send messages, read channels, and manage conversations in Slack directly from Claude Code. Post to channels, reply in threads, send DMs, search messages, add reactions, and manage channel membership.

plugins.name: confluence
plugins.description: Search, read, and create Confluence pages. Search with CQL, browse spaces, get page content, manage child pages, and create documentation.

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Read-only access to Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive. Search emails, check calendar events, read Drive documents, and retrieve Gemini meeting transcripts.

plugins.name: sonarqube
plugins.description: Fetch and analyze SonarQube code quality data - issues, quality gates, metrics, and project health.
